What You Get

What You'll Discover in the 1:1 Scientific Logo Consultation Call

🔬

Business Vibration Assessment

Complete analysis of your logo's vibrational alignment with your business goals and growth trajectory.

🔸

Logo Geometry Analysis

Sacred geometry principles applied to assess balance, proportion, and energetic flow in your logo design.

🎨

Color Frequency Reading

Deep analysis of how your logo's color palette influences customer psychology and cash flow patterns.

✍️

Typography Observation

Graphological analysis of your logo's fonts and how they project authority, trust, and growth energy.

🔄

Energy Flow Mapping

Complete mapping of energy pathways in your brand identity and how they affect business outcomes.

🧠

Subconscious Impact Study

Understanding how your logo programs your clients' subconscious buying and referral behaviour.

The Warning Signs

Impact of Vibrational Misaligned Logo

अगर आपके लोगो में ग़लत वाइब्रेशन हुई तो...

⚠️

Unstable Cash Flow

Revenue fluctuates wildly. No consistent pattern. Growth feels random and unreliable.

🚫

Low New Customer Attraction

Marketing spend goes up but client acquisition stays flat. Your brand doesn't magnetically pull people in.

💥

Employee & Coordination Conflicts

Team friction, high turnover, miscommunication — your logo's energy creates workplace dissonance.

💸

High Operational Costs

Expenses keep rising. Profitability shrinks. Money leaks from places you can't identify.

👨‍💼

Customer Retention Drop

Clients don't return. No repeat business. Word-of-mouth referrals have dried up completely.

🔒

Growth Block & Expansion Resistance

Doing everything right but growth has plateaued. Invisible ceiling you can't break through.

The Expert

Dr. Subhash Bothare

Ph.D. in Business Consulting — Scientific Logo Specialist

Completed Ph.D. in Business Consulting, specializing in the Science of Vibrations, Shapes, and Colors and their impact on business success through logo design. Creator of the Vibration Alignment Protocol (VAP) — the only scientific framework for logo-to-business performance mapping. Analyzed 15,000+ logos. Served 2,000+ business owners globally. Trained 1,500+ marketers. Consulted 150+ agency owners. Based in Mumbai. Featured across business consulting platforms.

Who Is This For?

Is This Consultation Right for You?

❌ This is NOT for you if...

  • ❌You think logo is just a picture and has no impact on business
  • ❌You are not willing to invest in your brand's energy correction
  • ❌You expect overnight magic without following the protocol
  • ❌You are not open to scientific analysis of ancient wisdom
  • ❌You are looking for cheap logo design service, not transformation

✅ This IS for you if...

  • ✅You are a serious business owner committed to removing hidden growth blockers
  • ✅You believe in the science behind vibrational alignment and energy flow
  • ✅You are ready to invest in a proven, systematic transformation protocol
  • ✅You want Ph.D.-level expert analysis, not generic design opinions
  • ✅You want financial growth backed by scientific logo correction

The Process

Loose Framework of 45 Min Consultation Call

1

Signature Analysis

Deep graphological assessment of your personal signature's energy alignment with your business vibration.

2

Wristwatch Analysis

Analysis of your wristwatch position and its energetic influence on your decision-making frequency.

3

Logo Analysis

Complete 11-indicator VAP analysis of your logo's vibrational impact across all business performance parameters.

4

Visiting Card Analysis

Assessment of your visiting card's layout, color, typography and energetic flow for networking success.

5

VAP Compatibility Explore

Exploration of how the Vibration Alignment Protocol applies specifically to your business sector and goals.

6

Financial Growth Roadmap

Personalised roadmap with actionable steps for aligning your brand identity with financial growth trajectory.
